title: Miami (Ohio): SMU win 'proved doubters wrong'
content: After much debate in the lead-up to NCAA tournament selections, Miami (Ohio) beat SMU in the First Four and advanced to face Tennessee in the first round.

title: NFL to consider 5-year window for pick trades
content: The Browns are proposing a rule change that would allow NFL teams to trade draft picks five years into the future instead of three.

title: Enfield denies misleading NCAA on Edwards' injury
content: SMU coach Andy Enfield said standout guard B.J. Edwards sat out Wednesday's loss to Miami (Ohio) in the First Four because he didn't feel "game ready" after the team announced last Friday that he would be available for the tournament.

title: LeBron says no interest in Vegas expansion bid
content: LeBron James, who has publicly entertained the possibility of being part of an ownership group for a potential NBA expansion franchise in Las Vegas, said he no longer intends to pursue the venture.

title: Kerr to the point: Dubs 'going to be in the play-in'
content: After a sixth loss in seven games, Warriors coach Steve Kerr laid bare the cold reality his team has been facing as it hobbles toward the regular season's conclusion: "We're going to be in the play-in. We know that."

title: Prairie View A&M's run continues in First Four win
content: One year after winning only five games, Prairie View A&M continued its dramatic turnaround by earning its first NCAA tournament victory, a 67-55 triumph over Lehigh on Wednesday night in the First Four.

title: Sources: WNBA cap set to top $10M by end of CBA
content: The projected salary cap under the pending WNBA collective bargaining agreement is set to exceed $10 million by the end of the agreement, sources told ESPN on Wednesday.

title: R.I. team wins state title after tragic rink shooting
content: The R.I. high school hockey team that was on the ice during a mass shooting in the stands last month capped its season with a state title Wednesday, with Colin Dorgan -- who lost 3 family members in the tragedy -- scoring the equalizer late in regulation.

title: 🏀 Best bets for men's tournament first round
content: As you prepare for tipoff, here are our best bets for the first round, plus picks for the new Eliminator game.

title: Women's March Madness Final Four, champion predictions
content: ESPN talent cast their votes for which foursome will reach the Final Four. Will Phoenix be full of chalk?

title: Ranking the best deals of the offseason: 16 signings and trades that received an 'A' grade
content: We've graded more than 60 signings and trades over the past few weeks. But only 16 moves received top marks. We ranked those deals.

title: Live tracking NFL free agency: Updates on signings, trades, cuts
content: We're following NFL free agency signings, trades, cuts, contract restructures and other moves as they happen.

title: Yates' rankings for the NFL draft: Sizing up the top 50 prospects, plus scouting reports
content: Who are the best players in this year's NFL draft class? Where do they stand out? Field Yates stacks his top 50 prospects.

title: Kiper's mock draft: How free agency shook up first-round landing spots for top prospects
content: How will top prospects come off the board in Round 1? Mel Kiper Jr. projects the draft's first 32 picks.

title: 27 straight wins: Remembering the most dominant stretch of LeBron James' career
content: When was LeBron James' peak? There's an argument to be made for 2013, when his Miami Heat did not lose for 52 straight days.

title: 'I'm not great at baseball most of the time': How Brent Rooker overcame failure to become an All-Star slugger
content: The designated hitter struggled early in his career -- but he's now a powerhouse hitter and crucial vocal leader in a young A's clubhouse.

title: Ranking the top 50 men's college basketball players who could define March Madness
content: From mid-major leaders to national superstars, here's who could impact their teams' NCAA tournament runs.

title: WNBA CBA negotiations: At last, WNBA and union 'aligned' on new CBA
content: The salary cap of the new CBA will reportedly start at $7 million, with the supermax salary starting at $1.4 million.

title: NHL playoff watch: Is Mammoth-Golden Knights a first-round preview?
content: The clubs face off Thursday -- and maybe again in mid-April. Plus, updated playoff projections, draft lottery standings.

title: HOF won't give puck to Hughes: Not his to own
content: The Hockey Hall of Fame said it will not give Jack Hughes the puck from his gold-medal-winning goal at the Milan Cortina Olympics.

title: Weekend predictions: Arsenal or Man City to win Carabao final? Who takes Madrid derby?
content: From a cup final in England to a Madrid derby and relegation six-pointer, another wild weekend of action awaits as Julien Laurens picks out the best games to watch in Europe.

title: Biggest questions, projections and more: Storylines to watch ahead of NBA playoffs
content: Our NBA insiders answer the biggest questions facing contenders in the East and West as the regular season winds to a close.

title: Even in Team USA defeat, the World Baseball Classic is a win for all of baseball
content: Denied gold by a Venezuelan team that symbolized the event at its best, Bryce Harper and the U.S. couldn't help but relish in the beauty of the WBC.

title: 20 contenders, 20 lingering weaknesses: Barnwell fixes roster holes as free agency slows down
content: Will Aaron Rodgers check the QB box for the Steelers? Can the Seahawks find running back help? And is there something the Chiefs can do at cornerback?

title: Lionel Messi has scored his 900th career goal! Can he reach 1,000? Can he pass Ronaldo?
content: Lionel Messi is never far from his next record or landmark. As the 2026 MLS season continues, he has hit yet another huge milestone: his 900th goal.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Man United make move for Newcastle's Guimarães
content: Manchester United have reportedly made a move for Bruno Guimarães, while Europe's biggest clubs keep an eye on Bournemouth's Rayan. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: What do the first two rounds of a perfect draft look like?
content: Tristan H. Cockcroft and Eric Karabell reveal the ideal outcome for the first two rounds of a 10-team draft from any starting draft position.

title: Eight standout fights on the PFL slate over the next five weeks
content: Champion Costello van Steenis, fan-favorite Paul Hughes and familiar names Bryan Battle, Sergio Pettis and more litter the PFL's upcoming schedule.

title: India to buy LPG from Russia? MEA says will ensure 'people's fuel needs are met'
content: India is actively seeking LPG from all available sources, including Russia, to secure energy supplies. This move comes as the Middle East conflict disrupts global energy markets. India is also continuing to provide energy assistance to neighboring nations like Bangladesh, Sri Lanka, and Maldives. Consumers are urged to use LPG wisely.

title: 'Russia driving wedge': Kyiv on 6 Ukrainians held for anti-India plot; MEA reacts
content: Ukraine called for a transparent investigation into the detention of six of its nationals in Mizoram, denying any involvement in terrorist activities. Kyiv suspects Russia is attempting to create discord between Ukraine and India, urging that allegations be based on verified facts and intergovernmental cooperation.

title: Pakistan's Shehzad compares IPL with PSL, calls it retired cricketers’ league
content: Ahmed Shehzad criticised the Pakistan Cricket Board after poor results, comparing the Pakistan Super League unfavourably with the Indian Premier League. He said PSL lacks quality and relies on a few backed players. Shehzad blamed both players and management, calling PCB weak and accusing players of avoiding responsibility during Pakistan’s ongoing slump.

title: 'Riot-like conditions': Rahul slams BJP over Delhi Eid violence fear; HC notice to cops
content: Rahul Gandhi alleges the BJP is creating a riot-like situation in Delhi. This follows the Uttam Nagar murder of Tarun and concerns over Eid violence. The Delhi High Court has ordered police to make arrangements. Gandhi urges Delhi residents to resist provocation and unite.

title: Years after Zuckerberg called it 'the next frontier’ for company, Meta shuts down Horizon worlds
content: Meta is shutting down its virtual reality social network, Horizon Worlds, for Quest headsets by June 15, 2026. The platform will transition to a mobile-only experience, aiming for greater focus and growth. This move follows significant investment and struggles to attract users, with the Reality Labs division reporting substantial losses.

title: Next Dhoni? No…‘one and only Sanju’: When Gambhir corrected Tharoor
content: Congress MP Shashi Tharoor expressed immense pride in Sanju Samson's Player of the Tournament performance in India's T20 World Cup triumph. Tharoor recalled an early prediction of Samson becoming the 'next Dhoni,' a sentiment later refined by Gautam Gambhir, who emphasized Samson forging his own unique path. Samson's recent match-winning innings solidified his status as a selfless and talented player.

title: IPL 2026: Check out new jerseys of all 10 teams
content: As the Indian Premier League 2026 season nears, all 10 teams have unveiled jerseys blending performance tech with cultural themes. From Royal Challengers Bengaluru’s champion look to fresh designs by Rajasthan Royals and Punjab Kings, each kit reflects identity, history and ambition, highlighting innovation and storytelling in this season’s visual evolution.

title: Perplexity AI CEO: Google search does a much better job than anyone else in the world
content: Perplexity CEO Aravind Srinivas, who once offered $34.5 billion for Google Chrome, now defaults Google search on his company's Comet iOS browser. He acknowledges Google's superiority for everyday navigational queries, while Comet aims to enhance answer quality and multimodal capabilities. This pragmatic approach positions Comet as a complementary tool, not a direct competitor, to Google.

title: D-Street bloodbath: Sensex crashes nearly 2,500 points; Rs 11L cr investors' wealth wiped out
content: Stock market crash today: Higher crude oil prices and a hawkish stance from the US Federal Reserve weighed heavily on investor sentiment.Within minutes of trading, the sharp decline erased over Rs 11 lakh crore from the total market capitalisation of BSE-listed firms.

title: Gautam gets serious on 'fake Gambhirs', moves court over AI deepfake misuse
content: In his petition, Gambhir has named multiple social media accounts, intermediaries and e-commerce platforms as defendants. He has sought a permanent injunction to restrain them from using his name, image, voice or persona without his consent.

title: 16-year-old guest worker from Assam raped by co-workers in Chennai; one held
content: In a harrowing incident in Chennai, a young guest worker from Assam, just 16 years old, has come forward with a troubling report of sexual assault at the hands of two colleagues. Authorities have arrested Ruben, the primary suspect, who is accused of not only assaulting her but also forcing her into a compromising situation with his associate, Alan Hussain.

title: 'Uncontrollable consequences': Iran hits Gulf energy sites after Israel targets key gas field
content: Iran escalated attacks on Gulf energy sites, hitting Saudi Arabia's SAMREF refinery and facilities in Qatar and Kuwait. These strikes, following an Israeli attack on Iran's South Pars gas field, caused global fuel prices to surge. Saudi Arabia, Qatar, and the UAE condemned the actions, while the US warned of retaliation if Iran continue

title: Gulf crisis: Govt classifies energy data as national security matter
content: India is mandating detailed operational data from its entire oil and gas sector, classifying it as a national security matter. This move aims to enhance government oversight of energy supplies amid Middle East war disruptions. The new order requires real-time reporting on production, imports, and consumption, enabling faster responses to crises and better procurement decisions.

title: ‘Like replacing Virat Kohli’: Riyan Parag on Sanju Samson’s Rajasthan Royals exit
content: Rajasthan Royals captain Riyan Parag acknowledged the immense void left by Sanju Samson's departure, comparing his irreplaceable talent to Virat Kohli's.  Parag highlighted the team's focus on addressing last season's late-game losses and building a balanced squad with strong spin and pace options.  He expressed confidence in the team's all-round strength and their ability to perform regardless of the venue.

title: IPL name controversy: BCCI faces legal showdown, Kerala HC steps in
content: The Kerala High Court has dismissed a plea challenging the 'Indian Premier League' name, deeming it without merit. Meanwhile, Karnataka has greenlit the M. Chinnaswamy Stadium for IPL 2026 matches, ending venue uncertainty. The 19th IPL season kicks off March 28th, with defending champions RCB facing Sunrisers Hyderabad in Bengaluru.

title: World Happiness Index: Finland at top, Afghanistan at bottom - check where India stands
content: Young people, especially teenage girls in Western nations, are experiencing a significant well-being decline due to heavy social media use, according to the World Happiness Report 2026. Finland leads as the happiest country for the ninth year.  While Nordic nations dominate, Costa Rica has surged.  Concerns are rising over social media's impact on youth satisfaction.

title: 'Shadi ke agle din hi?': Pant stunned at Arjun Tendulkar’s post-wedding revelation
content: Arjun Tendulkar has moved to Lucknow Super Giants for the 2026 IPL season, trading Mumbai Indians for ₹30 lakh. In a video, he discussed his preference for heavier bats, inspired by his father Sachin Tendulkar. Arjun also revealed he trained with Yuvraj Singh immediately after his wedding, impressing Rishabh Pant with his dedication.

title: Gold price today: Yellow metal plunges over Rs 3,600; check 24K, 22K city-wise rates
content: Gold prices experienced a significant drop in futures trade, influenced by a stronger US dollar and global market weakness. Rising US Treasury yields and inflation data further pressured the precious metal, making it less attractive as a safe-haven asset. This decline was reflected across major Indian cities, with varying degrees of reduction in gold rates.

title: Energy markets explode: Crude hits $114, gas jumps 35% after Iran targets Gulf fuel sites
content: Iran's strikes on Gulf energy infrastructure, including Qatar's LNG facility, have sent global oil and gas prices soaring. The attacks have disrupted supply routes, particularly the Strait of Hormuz, leading to significant price spikes and raising inflation concerns. Financial markets worldwide reacted negatively, with equities declining sharply amid growing uncertainty.

title: West Bengal elections: How the state voted in 2021 — the year BJP surged
content: The battle for Bengal has intensified as TMC and BJP announce candidate lists for the upcoming assembly elections. The BJP aims to challenge Mamata Banerjee's decade-long rule, having risen from a negligible presence to become the principal opposition. The 2021 elections marked a turning point, with the BJP securing 77 seats, a significant surge from its previous performance.

title: JD(U) MLA Anant Singh freed in Yadav death case; DGP cites cardiac failure
content: Patna High Court granted bail to Anant Singh, who was arrested in connection with the murder of Jan Suraaj supporter Dularchand Yadav. Singh, despite his arrest, won the Mokama Assembly seat and later took oath as MLA. Yadav was killed during a clash in Mokama on October 30.

title: South Pars, Ras Laffan & more: Which energy sites have been hit so far in Iran war?
content: Qatar condemned what it called a “brutal Iranian attack targeting Ras Laffan,” saying it posed a direct threat to national security. The foreign ministry also warned that “Targeting energy infrastructure constitutes a threat to global energy security, to the peoples of the region, and to its environment.” As missile and drone attacks spread across the Gulf, fears of a prolonged disruption to oil and gas supplies have intensified, with Brent crude briefly surging past $112 a barrel and global markets rattled.

title: Tata Sierra bags full 5 stars in BNCAP crash tests; details
content: The younger dummy scored 7.73 out of 8 in the frontal test, while the older dummy scored 8 out of 8. Both recorded full marks of 4 out of 4 in side impact tests. The SUV scored 9 out of 13 in the vehicle assessment category, resulting in a total of 44.73 out of 49 for child occupant protection.

title: Happy Eid-ul-Fitr: 50 heartfelt wishes, messages, and quotes for your loved ones
content: Eid-ul-Fitr, the joyous festival marking the end of Ramadan, is a time for gratitude, generosity, and togetherness. Families gather, homes are decorated, and delicious feasts are prepared. This occasion offers a perfect opportunity to express love and good wishes.

title: Just 350m away! Projectile strikes near Bushehr nuclear reactor, IAEA flags near miss
content: A projectile struck near Iran's Bushehr Nuclear Power Plant, approximately 350 meters from the reactor, according to the IAEA. The agency confirmed no damage to the reactor or injuries, but stressed that attacks near nuclear facilities violate safety principles. Russia's Rosatom reported the strike took place Tuesday and is urging de-escalation amid ongoing regional hostilities.

title: Khandala trip turns fatal: 3 IIT-Bombay students die as SUV overturns on Mumbai-Pune Expressway
content: Tragedy struck the Mumbai-Pune Expressway as three IIT Bombay students lost their lives in a car accident near Lonavala. The vehicle, returning from a Lonavala trip, reportedly overturned around 8:35 am, with police suspecting speeding as the primary cause. Faculty members have reached Panvel where post-mortems are underway for the deceased students.

title: Watch: Uprooted trees to flying chairs, Pak sees widespread destruction due to storm
content: Tragic downpour in Karachi claimed at least 21 lives as strong winds and rain caused widespread destruction. Walls, roofs, and trees collapsed, leading to fatal accidents across the city. The deadliest incident in Moach Goth saw 13 people perish when a wall gave way. Rescue efforts are underway amidst warnings of continued unstable weather

title: PCB under fire after report claims Babar, Fakhar played World Cup injured
content: Pakistan cricket faces a new controversy. Questions surround the fitness of Babar Azam and Fakhar Zaman during T20 World Cup selections. Medical evaluations flagged concerns after the tournament. Both players reportedly played with injuries. This has led to a review of their fitness clearances. Babar is now rehabilitating. Fakhar has returned to domestic cricket.

title: Long-awaited inauguration of Jewar Airport on March 28: How it will impact property prices in Noida
content: Noida's real estate market has transformed from an affordable alternative to a dynamic powerhouse, outperforming Gurugram in price growth. Driven by robust infrastructure, including the upcoming Jewar Airport and improved connectivity, the city now attracts end-users and premium projects, signaling a new era of sustained demand and value creation.

title: Assam election 2026: BJP releases list of candidates; CM Himanta to contest from Jalukbari
content: The Bharatiya Janata Party has unveiled its initial list of 88 candidates for the Assam assembly elections, with chief minister Himanta Biswa Sarma contesting from Jalukbari. The party has finalized seat-sharing with AGP and BPF, aiming to retain power. The announcement follows the declaration of the poll schedule for the 126-member assembly.

title: ‘What’s the big deal?’: Ashwin shuts down hype over Shivam Dube’s train ride
content: Ravichandran Ashwin has commented on Shivam Dube's train journey after India's T20 World Cup 2026 victory. Ashwin believes such everyday experiences should not be sensationalized. He advocates for international cricketers to enjoy simple moments. Dube traveled by train to reunite with his family. He was a key player in India's successful campaign.

title: From 'he helps' to 'he goes on the computer': Kids’ take on their dads’ jobs goes viral
content: A heartwarming viral Instagram reel showcases children's innocent perceptions of their fathers' professions. While the dads are engineers, scientists, and problem-solvers, their children believe they simply "make snacks," "go on the computer," or "help." This adorable contrast highlights how, to children, their fathers are defined by their presence and small acts of kindness rather than their complex careers.

title: Untimely rains damage crops in 1,481 hectares in Andhra Pradesh
content: Chief Minister Chandrababu Naidu asks officials to disseminate real-time weather updates and alerts to the farmers to enable them to protect their crops, and calls for thorough assessment of crop loss

title: Kerala directs universities to offer bilingual option for law exams; educators raise concerns over preparedness
content: Kerala lacks sufficient study materials in the vernacular, particularly in advanced areas such as jurisprudence. Apart from Malayalam translations of Constitution and major criminal laws prepared by Law department, there is a scarcity of comprehensive legal texts, including those on western laws, say experts

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election: civic issues take centre stage as electors in Chepauk-Thiruvallikeni seek permanent solutions
content: The DMK stronghold is set for a 4-cornered contest, with the ruling party and its allies, the AIADMK and BJP, TVK, and NTK in the fray. A few party representatives say they expect a narrow victory margin as it is likely that voters aged 18-30 may back parties such as TVK over the Dravidian majors

title: Assembly elections 2026 LIVE: BJP using ECI as weapon to win Bengal polls, says Kejriwal, supporting Mamata
content: Continuing with her tirade against the Election Commission, the Trinamool Congress supremo claimed that such action amounted to "systematic politicisation of institutions" and a "direct assault on the Constitution"

title: Coconut growers face hard times as West Asia tensions hit export orders
content: With farmers unable to complete export orders to Gulf Cooperation Council countries, there has been a glut of coconuts causing fall in prices in the local market

title: Anbumani blames alcohol, drugs for suicides
content: Citing a government policy document, he says 19,965 suicides were reported in 2024, of which 71% were linked in some manner to alcohol and substance abuse, including ganja

title: Rajnath Singh cites global conflicts to urge self-reliance in drone manufacturing
content: "As the entire world watches the ongoing conflict involving Russia and Ukraine, along with Iran-Israel, we can clearly see the extremely significant role of drones and counter-drone technologies in future warfare," Rajnath Singh said

title: With cost of inputs rising and exports disrupted, textile units in Perambalur take a hit
content: Industry sources said the prices of key raw materials such as polyester fibre and synthetic yarn, largely derived from petroleum products, have increased sharply in recent weeks

title: Vessels carrying Russian Urals crude to reach India on March 21
content: “Two container vessels are operating in the Strait of Hormuz,” Sujata Sharma, Joint Secretary, Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas said.

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election: CPI (M) unrelenting in demand for six seats, stalemate in talks with DMK continues
content: The DMK’s argument is that it cannot part with more seats as it has accommodated additional parties in the alliance and has already given three more seats to the Congress.

title: EC’s ‘arbitrary’ transfer of officials is political interference of highest order: Mamata
content: Mamata Banerjee said such action by the Election Commission was a “systematic politicisation of institutions” and a “direct assault on the Constitution”

title: Defectors from Congress in BJP’s first list of 88 candidates for Assam election
content: CM Himanta Sarma to contest from Jalukbari seat; Nagaon MP Pradyut Bordoloi, who quit the Congress, has been named as the BJP candidate from Dispur, while Bhupen Kumar Borah, who also joined the BJP recently from the Congress, will contest from Bihpura; Deputy Speaker Numal Momin and Minister Nandita Garlosa are dropped

title: BJP releases 2nd list of 111 candidates for Bengal polls
content: The BJP named Priyanka Tiberewal as its candidate from Entally seat and Sumana Sarkar from Balagarh seat

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Upcoming Assembly elections will be the most crucial for the State, says Rajeev Chandrasekhar
content: BJP State chief says the party is promising a corruption-free administration and reclamation of investments and employment opportunities for the State. He says it will be a three-way fight in all Assembly constituencies in the State

title: T.N. government amends maternity leave rules to benefit women employees
content: Under the amendment, maternity leave of 365 days may be granted for one additional delivery, even if a married woman government servant already has two surviving children born as twins in her first delivery

title: PM Modi speaks to Sultan of Oman, Malaysian PM; discusses West Asia situation
content: PM Modi reiterated India's condemnation of the violation of Oman's sovereignty and territorial integrity and appreciated its efforts to facilitate the safe return of thousands of people, including Indian nationals

title: Understand government's desire to take cautious stand, India must make call for peace: Tharoor on West Asia conflict
content: Congress leader Shashi Tharoor said India has enormous stakes in what is going on and its energy security is dependent on the situation in the Gulf, including its LPG and LNG imports

title: Why traders want Election Commission of India to revise the ₹50,000 cash-carrying limit
content: They argued the slab of ₹50,000 was fixed several years ago and urged that traders be allowed to carry cash up to ₹2 lakh

title: NTK manifesto pitches decentralised governance, anti-drug measures, and Tamil-centric policies
content: The manifesto proposes a major administrative overhaul, including the creation of multiple functional capitals across Tamil Nadu to ease pressure on Chennai and improve access to governance

title: Bird flu confirmed in Kerala’s Alappuzha; 5,961 birds to be culled
content: In view of bird flu outbreak, public has been urged to remain vigilant. Officials say any unusual mass death of birds should be reported to nearest veterinary hospital. Authorities to initiate containment measures

title: Bowing before Lord Ram same as paying homage to Mother India: President Murmu
content: She further noted that the same feeling that inspires devotion to Lord Ram also inspires patriotic sentiment

title: No LPG cylinder shortage in Bihar, queues outside agencies result of Congress ‘propaganda’: Minister
content: Bihar Industries Minister’s remark comes on a day the Congress staged a protest over shortage of cooking gas across the State

title: Rahul Gandhi appeals to people of Delhi's Uttam Nagar to maintain peace; accuses BJP of fanning violence
content: "Bloodshed is what only the BJP and its ecosystem desires, which seizes every opportunity to fan violence and hatred," Rahul Gandhi said.

title: Snake venom case: Supreme Court quashes FIR, proceedings against YouTuber Elvish Yadav
content: The case against Elvish Yadav was registered on November 22, 2023, and he was arrested on March 17, 2024, for the alleged use of snake venom at a rave party in Noida, Uttar Pradesh.

title: CM prays for prosperity and well-being of people on the occasion of Ugadi
content: Mr. Naidu said that Telugu culture was unique and its festivals diverse and all of them signify the worship of the almighty and nature together

title: Crude bomb hurled at policeman’s house at Kannavam in Kannur
content: The incident occurred around 1 a.m. and the bomb landed at the veranda of the house. But the bomb did not explode

title: Joharapuram dumpyard on Kurnool outskirts to be cleared in two months
content: Value of land at Joharapuram is on the higher side and each acre is likely to be around ₹50 crore, Minister T. G. Bharat said

title: NHAI to prepare DPR for four-lane Tiruchi-Karur-Coimbatore greenfield highway
content: Floats tender for appointing consultant for preparing the detailed project report for the highway and a northern bypass road in Tiruchi city

title: Watch: Rajya Sabha elections: What are the takeaways?
content: The recent Rajya Sabha elections went down to the wire. The National Democratic Alliance romped home with all five Rajya Sabha seats in Bihar and three in Odisha, and one from Haryana. What do these elections say about the deeply partisan nature of politics?

title: Two youngsters killed in road accident near Venjaramoodu in Thiruvananthapuram
content: As per preliminary investigation, motorbike rams a tipper lorry and as the driver of the lorry swerves the vehicle, it overturns and falls on a car. The deceased were travelling on the motorbike and two occupants of the car have been injured

title: Mumbai to witness mainly clear sky, temperatures to hover around 32 degrees Celsius
content: The city is expected to remain largely dry, with only isolated light rain possible in some areas during the morning hours

title: Kerala Assembly polls: BJP announces second list of 39 candidates; Kummanam to contest from Aranmula
content: C.C. Mukundan, ousted CPI legislator who later joined BJP, to seek mandate from Nattika, while B. Gopalakrishnan is fielded in Guruvayur

title: SBI Foundation Conclave deliberates on urban ecosystem conservation
content: Swapan Dhar, Managing Director, SBI Foundation, said collaboration across sectors, institutions, and communities is necessary for effective climate action.

title: Thoothukudi Class 12 girl murder: one person arrested
content: The 17-year-old girl reportedly went missing on March 10 after she went to a nearby scrub jungle area around 6 p.m.

title: Not a CM probable; ideally post should go to elected MLA: Shashi Tharoor
content: Exuding confidence of a UDF victory, Mr. Tharoor said there is 10 years of anti-incumbency against the LDF government

title: Telangana Cyber Security Bureau on going online with confidence
content: A cyber hygiene workshop conducted by the Telangana Cyber Security Bureau for women journalists had practical tips that can empower all women in the digital age

title: Firing at trader’s residence in M.P., ₹10 Crore threat issued; Bishnoi Gang named in post
content: The incident took place on Monday (March 16) at Bhilgaon under Kasrawad police station limits, about 50 km from the district headquarters. Security has been deployed at the residence of the trader, Dilip Rathore, he said.

title: Canadian High Commissioner meets Uttar Pradesh CM Yogi to discuss investment
content: India-Canada partnership gains new momentum, High Commissioner calls UP an emerging hub of investment and innovation

title: Ghosts in the darkness: Waiting for lions at Sasan, Gir
content: Between pre-dawn jeep rides, long silences in the brush and hours of watching the forest, India’s last refuge of Asiatic lions slowly reveals why its resident monarchs still rule its dry deciduous kingdom

title: Pradyut Bordoloi’s son withdraws as Congress candidate
content: Prateek Bordoloi said his father’s decision to join the BJP made it inappropriate for him to continue as a Congress candidate, but reaffirmed his allegiance to Congress

title: Watch: The Amit Shah playbook: Rebuilding NDA in Tamil Nadu | Focus Tamil Nadu
content: In election-bound Tamil Nadu, Union Home Minister Amit Shah has pulled off what many thought was unthinkable—bringing together sworn rivals, the AIADMK and its splinter group, the AMMK. In doing so, he has not only rebuilt a fractured NDA in Tamil Nadu but also strengthened it ahead of the elections. How did this happen?

title: Junior colleges to reopen on April 1 for second year students in Andhra Pradesh
content: The Board of Intermediate Education, Andhra Pradesh, has released the annual academic programme (calendar) for the intermediate course (both general and vocational streams) for the academic year 2026–27

title: Transgender persons bill 'draconian', expect no better from government: Derek O'Brien
content: In a post on X, the TMC leader expressed his disappointment, stating that he expected "no better" from a government with a "dubious record."

title: Maharashtra staff unions serve strike notice for April 21 over pension, recruitment issues
content: Employee unions have formally informed the State government of their decision to proceed with the agitation

title: Gujarat Cops Thrash 18 Accused In Public During Crime Scene Reconstruction
content: In a stark display of "street justice" that has sent shockwaves through the region, police in Gujarat's Patan district were seen assaulting 18 accused members of an extortion gang in public during a crime scene reconstruction.

title: BJP Names Roopa Ganguly, Sandeshkhali Victim In Second List For Bengal Polls
content: The BJP named Priyanka Tiberewal as its candidate from Entally seat and Sumana Sarkar from Balagarh seat.

title: Hidden Cameras, 58 Women: Nashik Astrologer And His Farmhouse Of Secrets
content: According to the police FIR, Ashok Kharat, who refers to himself as 'Captain' as he is a retired Merchant Navy officer, used to summon women to his office by luring them with promises of resolving their personal problems.

title: Former Ambassador Jawed Ashraf Awarded France's Legion d'honneur Commandeur Distinction
content: Former ambassador and chairman of the India Trade Promotion Organisation (ITPO), Jawed Ashraf was conferred the rank of Commandeur, the third-highest distinction of France's prestigious Legion d'honneur on Wednesday.

title: Death, Survival, And Miraculous Escape: Fate Of 5 Brothers In Delhi Fire
content: For Rajender Kashyap and his family members who survived the flames, life is in shambles. They must now pick up the pieces.

title: 11-Year-Old Boy Charged With Murder Of Younger Brother In Colorado: Reports
content: An 11-year-old boy suspected of killing his five-year-old brother in Colorado has been charged with murder, US media reported Wednesday.

title: Pinarayi Vijayan Files Nomination From Dharmadom Seat For Kerala Polls
content: Kerala Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan on Thursday filed his nomination from the Dharmadom Assembly constituency here.

title: UK Woman Accused Of Stealing $238 Million In Bitcoin From Ex-Husband
content: After their divorce, a husband has accused his ex-wife of plotting to steal Bitcoin worth millions and luxury watches in a case that's set to test how digital assets are treated by English civil courts.

title: Russia Plans To Refer Women Who Don't Want Children To Psychologists
content: Russia will refer women who do not want to have children to psychologists under new health guidelines designed to address a systemic demographic crisis.

title: Pramod Boro's UPPL To Go Solo In Assam Polls, No Tie-Up With NDA Or Congress
content: The United People's Party Liberal (UPPL), led by Pramod Boro, on Wednesday said it will contest the upcoming Assam Assembly elections independently.

title: Old vs New Income Tax Regime: These Rules Can Help You Save Over Rs 1 Lakh
content: New Income Tax Rules: In the last few years, many taxpayers have moved to the new regime as it offers lower tax rates and less paperwork. But there's a trade-off.

title: Chinese University Tells Students To 'Fall In Love' During Spring Break
content: A Chinese university is urging students to "enjoy the flowers, fall in love" during their mid-term break, an unusual directive in a nation obsessed with getting good grades, as authorities seek new ways to spur marriages and domestic consumption.

title: Nuke Site Or Empty Hall? UN Watchdog Clueless On Iran's Isfahan Enrichment Facility
content: Iran has reportedly developed a new uranium enrichment site at an underground complex in Isfahan, which was apparently badly damaged in attacks by the US and Israel on Iran's nuclear facilities last June.

title: The Strait Of Hormuz Has Been Targeted Before. A Look At Past Disruptions
content: The US and Israel's war with Iran has thrust the Strait of Hormuz at the heart of geopolitical conflict. Iran has brought to a halt nearly all traffic in the waterway, shutting down a critical path for the world's flow of oil.

title: UP Man Sees Wife's 'Cement And Drum' Facebook Post, Lets Her Go With Lover
content: According to Rajkumar, his wife was having an affair and would often argue with him before leaving to be with her lover.

title: Video: Children, Villagers Rescue Deer Attacked By Stray Dogs In Madhya Pradesh
content: Madhya Pradesh's Chhatarpur woke up to chaos as panic swept through Shahgarh Gram Panchayat in the Bajna Forest Range when a frightened deer, driven out of its shrinking habitat, ran straight into a human settlement.

title: Women's tournament odds: UConn odds-on favorite; UCLA, Texas, South Carolina next
content: the shortest odds for a pre-tournament favorite since 2018, was also the last time UConn was favored going into the tournament . the SEC dominates the next four spots between Texas (+700), south Carolina (+800), LSU (16-1, opened 14-1) and Vanderbilt (50-1) and Michigan (80-1) .

title: CFB spring buzz: Bama expectations, Texas upgrades and a freshman QB making waves
content: Alabama coach Kalen DeBoer says it's more than his 20-8 record in the past two seasons there . "we're going to do things the right way," he says in a sit-down interview . he is looking for his first college football playoff appearance with the Trojans .

title: Jay Bilas predicts every game of the 2026 NCAA tournament
content: the 2026 men's NCAA tournament is revealed in a bracket . the bracket gives us less than five minutes . my bracket was chalky last season, but the backlash was swift and unrelenting . I was criticized for not picking an underdog to reach Sao Paulo .

title: Broncos are all-in, and Dolphins are all-out, but does either strategy make sense?
content: the Broncos traded their first-, third- and fourth-round picks in this year's draft . they traded a wideout for Jaylen Waddle and a fourth round pick . the studs continue to indicate that they're tearing down their roster . a new regime appears to be going down that way .

title: Power Rankings: Sixth men, rookies and unsung heroes for all 30 teams
content: the Lakers beat the Rockets for their sixth straight win . there's less than a month left in the 2025-26 regular season . teams are already claiming spots in the postseason as well as bowing their way out of any chance of extending their season into June .

title: Big 12's top newcomers and what their coaches think
content: the big 12 football landscape is being reshaped by 2026 newcomers . the list includes some of the most high-profile transfers in the country . this breakdown looks at why they matter and how their own coaches and GMs expect them to fit .

title: UCL talking points: Are Arsenal favorites? Is anyone game enough to write off Madrid?
content: the UEFA champions league round of 16 is done and dusted . a number of heavyweights were sent packing . arsenal, arsenal and barcelona claim to be favorites to lift the famous UCL trophy in Budapest on may 30 .
